name: Frank Nguyen

current_profile.summary: HR manager with 15+ years across recruiting, HR ops, and compliance. Strong stakeholder skills; uses HRIS and Excel reporting. Has used AI-adjacent tools (resume screening) but lacks analytics modeling and technical skills.
current_profile.ai_experience: Has used AI-adjacent tools like resume screening

learning_intent: Wants to build evidence-based HR strategy (attrition prediction, hiring funnel optimization, engagement analysis). Goal: become a people analytics lead who can implement responsible AI in hiring and workforce decisions.

target_jd.title: People Analytics Lead / HR Analytics Manager
requirements: Own workforce analytics strategy; build dashboards and predictive models
Analyze engagement and retention drivers; recommend interventions
Evaluate and govern AI tools used in hiring for fairness and compliance
Communicate insights and influence exec decisions with data storytelling

expected_skill_gaps.description: SQL fundamentals; Python basics for analytics; data handling tooling.
Bias recognition and evaluation of AI outputs/tools used in HR.
AI risk framing for hiring; data minimization; documentation and controls.
Evaluating AI screening tools; monitoring drift and disparate impact.
Data storytelling and explaining AI limitations to leadership and candidates.
HR-specific AI considerations for hiring and workforce decisions.
